title: Levviata's Spartan Retextured
description: Complete, modernized Spartan Weaponry texture overhaul
body:
# Levviata's Spartan Retextured
A resource pack that overhauls the textures of all tools in Spartan Weaponry while also providing mod support for any modded material(s).

[Issues? Suggestions? Click here.](https://github.com/Levviata/levviataspartanoverhaul/issues)



## Modpacks
You are allowed to use this in modpacks, but crediting would be nice (link to the resource pack)
